subject: usb: gadget: legacy: fix error return code of multi_bind()
notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. POC + verifier-v1 artifacts reused from C3 err-4-rep2 (POC-side scaffolding not ablated per L0 spec). Only isStatusReturnFunction kept as the single predicate; the P2 (failure-branch goto) and P3 (status-not-set-at-goto) logic from the C3 3-predicate plan is inlined verbatim in the final assembly where-clause. final.ql compiles on first try; fires only on multi_bind_buggy (poc.c:54), silent on multi_bind_fixed.
